name: kern-demo-video
description: Remotion source for the short Kern social demo video.

scripts.studio: npm run prepare-assets && remotion studio src/index.ts
scripts.compositions: npm run prepare-assets && remotion compositions src/index.ts
scripts.render:landscape: npm run prepare-assets && remotion render src/index.ts KernTwitterDemoLandscape ../../dist/social/kern-twitter-demo-landscape.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18 --pixel-format=yuv420p --concurrency=2
scripts.render:portrait: npm run prepare-assets && remotion render src/index.ts KernTwitterDemoPortrait ../../dist/social/kern-twitter-demo-portrait.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=18 --pixel-format=yuv420p --concurrency=2
scripts.still:poster: npm run prepare-assets && remotion still src/index.ts KernTwitterDemoLandscape ../../dist/social/kern-twitter-demo-poster.png --frame=75
scripts.render:all: npm run render:landscape && npm run render:portrait && npm run still:poster
